channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Damaged and uprooted width restriction post, 4th July
item.description:
Damaged by car incident it appears.. have photos but not uploading. Police had cordoned off damaged car. Car now removed
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Auckland Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: West end Brondesbury villas, 4th July
item.description:
Filthy !

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 51 Chichester Road, 4th July
item.description:
A black samsonite suitcase has been left outside 51 Chichester Road for over a day.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chichester Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Ajax Road parking, 4th July
item.description:
There are areas of uneven and deteriorated road surface along the carriageway edge, particularly near the kerbside parking area. The surface appears worn and uneven, with shallow depressions and broken/loose material in places. Please could the highway team inspect and repair as necessary

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Ajax Road, West Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Roadwork signs left behind, 4th July
item.description:
A number of roadwork signs from previous road closure remain and cover a length of 100m or so (think there were about 5 in total). In Copers Cope Road - from Avery Close to Century Way They are also damaging the grass. Please can these be picked up
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Utility Works and Temporary Traffic Lights

item.title: Water leak in road, 4th July
item.description:
Water leaking into road outside Toby Carvery on A21
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Victoria Road, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 4th July
item.description:
Street is dumping ground

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lightcliffe Road, Southgate

item.title: Fridge with rotting food left outside the block, 4th July
item.description:
Has been there for about a week now

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Homerton High Street, Hackney, London

item.title: They are going to die, 4th July
item.description:
Please water them

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Leaveland Close, Eden Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned and vandalised lime bike, 4th July
item.description:
Left on pavement. Have moved behind bin as was obstructing path. Completely broken/un useable.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): West Street, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Branches to be cut back, 4th July
item.description:
Branches are blocking to be able to see the on coming traffic around the corner

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rookery Road, Clapham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street is full of rubbish, 4th July
item.description:
After every bin collection rubbish always on the street everywhere the street doesn’t get swiped regularly, rats running around already this make it worse

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bodney Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping by outdoor drinkers, 4th July
item.description:
Antisocial outdoor drinkers have left a load of rubbish on the pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pembury Place, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox on grass verge wrapped in a grey blanket, 4th July
item.description:
Car ran over fox cub and did not stop. Fox cub did not survive. I heard a bang and saw the cub moving about on the road. I went to the cub but it was already dead. I laid my grey blanket over the cub for dignity and so I could pick him up.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 97, Wellington Avenue, Blackfen, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Board and cardboard flytipped, 4th July
item.description:
Sheet of plywood and two large cardboard boxes

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rochester Way, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blind peoples crossing bubble slabs covered with road debris. Debris on northend road from bridge road to thames road causing cylist to ride on pedestrian paths, 4th July
item.description:
I reported this 1 year ago to the councilors who said the roads get swept wvery year. But evidently they do not sweep the paths. This is possibly a fatal incident waiting to happen with a blind person crossing by the shell petrol garage or a cyclist hut a pedestrian where they are not using the lane that was made for cycling due to excessive debris which has come frome the antislip road which was laid to prevent accidents but has just put pedestrian in danger.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Northend Road, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Leaf debris needs clearing, 4th July
item.description:
Edge of pavement is full of leaf and foliage debris, needs cleaning

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 75, Wickham Way, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 4th July
item.description:
Past a flytip whilst sat on the 273 Dunkery Road j/w Court Farm Road in woods.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dunkery Road, Mottingham, Greater London

item.title: Something random in the street, 4th July

Precisely

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 172, Venner Road, Penge, Greater London

item.title: Graffiti, 4th July
item.description:
The much loved ‘Herne Hill’ painted sign beneath the railway bridge. Will need green paint to repair it. Thank you
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Half Moon Lane, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
